name: point-of-sale-desktop
description: Electron shell for Point of Sale

scripts.dist:win: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:win:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir --win --config electron-builder.pack.yml
scripts.dist:win:fiscal: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.fiscal.yml
scripts.dist:win:publish: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.dist:win:fiscal:publish: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.fiscal.yml --publish always
